                                                                                                                    of certain industries and to support the field which needs financing
                                                                                                                    services but lacks credit. Moreover, it is difficult to balance regional
                                                                                                                    economic development. Although international experience is worth
                                                                                                                    learning, it cannot solve China’s own problems. China’s problems
                                                                                                                    require the solutions provided by development-oriented finance. CDB looks for truth from facts depicting national conditions. It
                                                                                                                    always makes creative work, explores the development-oriented
                                                                                                                    finance with Chinese characteristics, and actively solves the contra-
                                                                                                                    diction between the enormous financial demand and the lagged
                                                                                                                    financial market development. (3) In the process of solving the conflicts, we should develop Marxist
                                                                                                                    dialectical theory of credit. Credit activities have common attributes
                                                                                                                    with construction projects and other social activities, while there are
                                                                                                                    some unique properties for it, such as social, moral, and subjective. As the basis for social activities, credit activities not only reflect the
                                                                                                                    reality of existence but also continue to create a new existence. Credit is able to be built and credit construction can be driven.
